scenario.name: SIP_INVITE_RECEIVE_CHFE
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: sip:CHFE@[local_ip]:[local_port] Allow: INVITE, ACK, CANCEL, OPTIONS, BYE, REGISTER, INFO Accept: application/sdp, application/EmergencyCallData.ServiceState+json Content-Length:0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: sip:CHFE@[local_ip]:[local_port] Expires: 86400 Content-Length:0

NOTIFY sip:service@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$1] To: [$2] Call-ID: [$3] Event: emergency-ServiceState Subscription-State: active;expires=86400 Max-Forwards: 70 CSeq: [cseq] NOTIFY Contact: sip:CHFE@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Type: application/EmergencyCallData.ServiceState+json Content-Length: [len]
{ "service": { "name": "PSAP", "domain": "chfe.ng911.example.com", "serviceId": "chfe.ng911.example.com" }, "serviceState": { "state": "Normal", "reason": "" } }
